name: You gained invisibility
description:
"Hey, did you hear something?"

"Huh? ...uh no?"

After gaining the ability to become invisible, you found yourself sneaking into the swim teams locker room. You already know why you're here. To get revenge on the same girl that's always fucked with you, since you started school. Hannah, and her friends, Beth and Bella, are about to see, or not see, what happens when they fuck with someone's life.

It's your favorite smut creator, back with another banger. Prank em John.
creator: IcarusIce
